title: Poor Little Rich Kid
summary: Gonad Goldrump, a frail and petulant child of a wealthy but cruel father, learns to lie to survive kindergarten, earning distrust from peers and setting the stage for a life of manipulation.

title: An Early Inheritance
summary: After his father loans him a fortune and tells him to leave, Gonad spirals into decadence with friends, squandering his wealth until his father, in a final act of spite, tops him up 'for the last time.'

title: A Father Figure for the Desperate
summary: Gonad meets a charismatic mentor who teaches him the ruthless trio of rules: 'Attack, Attack, Attack,' 'Admit Nothing, Deny Everything,' and 'Always Claim Victory,' shaping his worldview through brutal lessons.

title: More Wrong-Headed Life Lessons
summary: Gonad's mentor expands his playbook with legal and media strategies, turning lawsuits into weapons, manipulating headlines, and ensuring he never settles, further entrenching his manipulative style.

title: The Merchant's Gambit
summary: Gonad infiltrates a merchant guild, using lawsuits and media spins to corner rivals, earning a reputation as a shrewd businessman while the guild's leaders, wary of his methods, quietly plot his downfall.

title: The Art of the Scapegoat
summary: When a failed trade deal threatens his standing, Gonad frames a loyal servant as the scapegoat, leveraging the guild's fear of public blame to secure a new contract and a promotion to guild overseer.

title: The Whispering Forest
summary: Gonad ventures into the northern forests, exploiting a logging dispute by bribing locals and planting rumors of a rival warlord, securing timber deals that drain the forest and enrich his coffers.

title: The Shadow of the Desert
summary: A caravan route through the desert is nearly lost to bandits, but Gonad stages a 'rescue' with hired mercenaries, claiming victory in the press and earning the trust of the trade council, though the council grows wary of his theatrics.

title: The Queen's Coin
summary: Gonad is summoned to the court of the young Queen Elara, where his charm and cunning win him a seat on her advisory council, though he secretly manipulates court politics to secure a royal trade charter for his growing empire.

title: The Unseen Thread
summary: Gonad's web of influence tightens as he engineers the downfall of a rival councilor through a framed scandal, yet the queen begins to question his loyalty, sensing the threads of his schemes.

title: The Crown's New Architect
summary: Publicly hailed as the queen's 'architect of prosperity,' Gonad is granted a seat in the Royal Treasury, where he begins reshaping the economy through opaque deals, further isolating himself from the court's scrutiny.

title: The Ledger of Lies
summary: Gonad's financial reforms, cloaked in complexity, begin to strain the treasury's reserves. A minor audit uncovers discrepancies, but he quells the uproar by framing the auditor as a 'corrupt bureaucrat' in the press.

title: The Storm in the East
summary: A trade war erupts with the eastern dominions after Gonad's tariffs backfire, yet he spins the crisis as a 'necessary sacrifice for future glory,' rallying public support through a media campaign that paints him as the queen's savior.

title: The Unmasking
summary: A leaked letter reveals Gonad's manipulations, sparking riots in the streets. The queen, cornered, publicly names him as the architect of the crisis, but Gonad, now a public figure, doubles down with a speech that frames the leak as a 'foreign plot.'

title: The Empire of Ashes
summary: The dominions' economy collapses under Gonad's schemes. He flees to his estates, but the queen, now a figurehead, is forced to negotiate with foreign powers, while the people turn on the institutions that once trusted him.

title: The Last Laugh
summary: Gonad, hidden in his manor, watches the chaos unfold through a spy network, convinced the dominions will rise again under his 'guidance,' yet the once-loyal merchants now plot his downfall in secret.

title: The People's Ledger
summary: A populist movement emerges, led by a former merchant who survived Gonad's schemes. The people demand transparency, and the queen, now a pawn, is forced to confront the architect of her ruin.

title: The Reckoning
summary: Gonad is dragged from his manor, his once-loyal servants turning on him. The people, through a new council, demand reparations, but Gonad, undeterred, claims victory in the press, calling the reckoning a 'necessary step toward unity.'

title: The Unbroken Cycle
summary: The dominions limp toward recovery, but Gonad, now a symbol of hubris, is exiled to the edge of the map, where he begins anew with a new set of victims, repeating the same cycle of manipulation and betrayal.

title: The Tail's End
summary: Years later, a young boy in a distant village hears tales of Gonad's rise and fall. The story, passed down, becomes a cautionary tale of unchecked greed, though the boy, like Gonad once, is already lying to his peers to gain their trust.
